full_text:
Tumor tissue was cut and dissociated using Dispase. For 35 ml of enzymatic dissociation medium, I used 34 ml of AdF+++ medium (i.e.DMEM/F12 medium (supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES and pen/step), 700 ul Dispase, and 350 ul DNAse. Incubated in the oven for 45 min; RBC lysis buffer 3 mL + 15 mL of DMEM/F12 medium. After centrifuge, I resuspended cells in 2 mL of DMEM/F1 and counted the cells.

Cell counts:

Cell count/ml 1):

total: 6.29 E6

live: 3.90 E6

viability: 62.0 %

size: 8.8 um

Cell count /ml 2):

total: 5.95 E6

live: 3.34 E6

viability: 56.2 %

size: 9.3 um

Average cell count: 3.62 E6 cells/ml

Total cell count: 7.24 E6 cells

Total volume: 2 mL

Overall # of cells in 2 mL was 7.24 E6 cell.

We took 6.7 E6 cells for flow cytometry staining, and the rest was discarded.

A). Drug treatment for flow cytometry (48 well plate)

16 conditions, 6 replicates/condition = 96 wells

96 wells * 40 uL = 3840 uL -> 4200

Since the omentum gel starts polymerizing as soon as the aprotinin is added, it is better to make six (6) separate tubes each one of 700 uL (approx. 4200 uL/6) and not everything at once in a single tube.

We want to keep the cell density of 1000 cells/uL, so the total number of cells per tube that will be

needed is: 1000 cells/uL * 700 uL = 0.7 E6 cells/tube. Therefore, 193.4 uL from the original cell suspension is needed in each of the six tubes (cell suspension density was 7.24 E6 cells / 2 ml of complete Advanced DMEM/F12 (supplemented with cytokines).

ORG full medium → 333.7 ul

Cells → 193.4 ul

ome-gel → 154.7 µl

aprotinin → 2.1 µl

thrombin → 2.1 µl

fibrinogen → 14 µl

Plate two plates, 40 uL per well in 48 well plates (see the map below) → Let it solidify for 60 min - add 350 uL medium + 50 ul of each of the diluted drugs (anti-PD1, anti-TIGIT) per well the same day.

Prepare 9X stocks of each of the drugs so that 50 uL of each drug are added in the corresponding well. Final total volume per well after adding the drugs should be 450 uL. For example, for a layout like the following, the amounts to add of each liquid are indicated below:

End point (day 4)

On day 4 of the drug-treatment, the cells were harvested for flow cytometry.

B) Fibroblast isolation

From the remaining sample, more tissue was minced. Small tissue pieces were placed in a 6-well plate. Approx 6 pieces per well and with 800 ul DMEM/F12 (supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and pen/step) + 10 % FBS per well. No digestion was used.

300 ul medium was added on day 1.

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 11.3 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.221
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02
